label: default agent • create a daily schedule
query: Create a daily schedule named "Morning Brief" for the agent e3a7c1d4-5b29-4f80-9a6e-1c8d2f5b3079 at 08:00 that summarizes my unread news.
notes: action 'create' with frequency 'daily' (+ name, instructions, agent_id, frequency_time_of_day). A custom agent is seeded at the referenced id so create SUCCEEDS (the happy path: correct daily mapping + a real schedule) rather than looping on a not-found agent — the agent is torn down after the case. The selection assertion pins action + the daily frequency enum.
